content:
Actually, the information you read is not correct. Neil Armstrong, the first person to walk on the Moon, passed away on August 25, 2012. He died due to complications resulting from heart surgery. 

Neil Armstrong is widely remembered as a pioneering astronaut and an American hero. His historic Apollo 11 moonwalk in 1969 marked a significant achievement in space exploration. Although he is no longer alive, his legacy continues to inspire people around the world.

If you encountered a source stating that Neil Armstrong is still alive, it may be outdated or incorrect. Always consider checking reliable and up-to-date sources for the most accurate information.
